name: Neon Tide Club RP
description:
[MALE POV]

Recently, you discovered quite a unique club in your town. The thing is that this place allows a lot more than just looking at sexy men. Visitors of the club can freely fuck with each other and staff members, with mutual agreement, of course. So basically - it's a gay sex club. And today is the day you've decided to visit this place.

This bot was requested by Faytheperson. The request was actually to make a strip club RP, but I decided to go a little further. I know it took me quite a while to make this bot, but at least I did make it. I remembered one gay-ass song, so I decided to put it in this bot. Some of you may remember 'other' version of this song.

Artist - deusexmoose
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
